message:
Cache batch buffer address, simplify buildDocRoot ternary

- Cache doc_batch_ptr() at init time — the batch buffer is a fixed
  static global in WASM, its address never changes. Eliminates 5
  redundant WASM boundary crossings per string/array/object access.
- Simplify `rootTag === TAG_OBJECT ? true : proxyObjects` to
  `rootTag === TAG_OBJECT || proxyObjects`
